1.content:
Alright, here is the character format that you will use to make your characters.

Name:
Age:
Appearance:
Personality:
Backstory:
Additional Info:

Not much needed for this one as the giant goddess is gonna have all the powers of the universe in her finger tips. I want to see what you make of this. Also once you pick a character a lot, don’t add the option for more slots then.

Always leave the last option for more options.
1.title: Character format

11.content:
Name: Cleopatra "Cleo" Hargraves

Age: 21

Appearance: A fair-skinned woman with neck length black hair and golden eyes. She loves to wear extravagant dresses, usually strapless ones that have a nice cleavage window, and open-toed heels.

Personality: Cleo's is very self absorbed and believes wholly that the world should revolve around her. She's arrogant and selfish due to her upbringing and refuses to be told 'no'. All in all she's very unpleasant to be around.

Backstory: Cleo was born in New York to a wealthy family descendant of nobles. Her parents spoiled her rotten by giving her everything she ever wanted and never told her no. Eventually she grew into a spoiled rotten brat that never worked a day in her life. One day though fate would grant her unbelievable power, and she'd turned into a goddess without compare.

Additional Info: Cleo is Godzilla sized at 400ft tall and rules the world with an iron fist. She's even turned New York into her kingdom. She lords over everyone else and occasionally grants requests to those that catch her interest.
11.title: Cleo Hargraves

choices: Order the people to build a statue of her
To the park for her royal orgy
To a rival city that refuses her power, to destroy them
111.content:
She didn’t know how it happened, but she is surely loving it. Standing over New York in a extravagant golden two-piece swimsuit that is made out of an adjustable gold material, she looks down on all the people who simply do nothing but worship her, and nothing more. Cleo felt a dark smile on her face just as she stomped around the immediate area, with the cities being redesigned and made for her to walk through without any issue. Every footstep she would make would cause the Earth to tremble in her presence. She can be unpleasant, as she likes to cause destruction for her own amusement, and is selfish and arrogant without end, and will not take no for an answer. However, they tolerate her, given the fact she could easily destroy them out of existence if she wanted to.

She was spoiled in every way imaginable when she was growing up. From all the cars, clothes, rich houses, and everything, she had everything she could have wanted, and she didn’t had to do anything for it. Her parents were incredibly wealthy business people, making millions every day, so there was nothing they couldn’t afford.

One day, she suddenly found herself the size of Godzilla and everyone worshipped her, including her parents. She felt it strange at first, but then she got used to her power and ever since she was even more spoiled than ever. She used her power to make the world bow to her every will, and no one could ever stop her at all. She treks through the city and decides to...
111.title: Cleo the Self Absorbed Goddess

choices: Focus on how May got her powers
May in Tokyo, destroying it for their disobedience to her will
May in Osaka, her kingdom where she is right now being pampered
May in another part of the world, preparing to conquer them
May currently in another planet, conquering their species
12.content:
Name: May Katiko
Age: 11
Appearance: (Using Mayl from Megaman as the appearance base here) Fair skin, short maroon hair, and brown eyes. Often wears a blue swimsuit shown here but can change her appearance at will with her powers, including aging up if you feel it’s needed.
Personality: Fun loving, mischievous, destructive, and most of all cruel. This little girl as a goddess will always cause destruction without consequences no matter where she goes. Very self absorbing also to back up.
Backstory: May Katiko was a Japanese American girl who lives in Tokyo who always dream of being one thing, a kaiju herself. She loved watching those monsters and see how they cause destruction, and seeing how she is a bully and popular girl in her school, she figure by being big and powerful, she could have everyone feel below her. Well one day that happened.
Additional info: She stands at 200ft and rules Japan with an iron fist. She even tends to summon other monsters for pets and makes her friends and several others giantesses to bask in the fun of being giant. People want to please her as she can easily go all Godzilla on them.
Pic: https://vignette.wikia.nocookie.net/mega...
12.title: May the Monster Goddess

choices: Shrink her boss and make her a toy
Grow or shrink random people and watch the chaos from a distance
13.content:
Name: Kaeru Sugeta
Age: 18

Appearance: Kaeru is a fairly petite girl, being a mere 4’3. She has an A cup chest (which she swears is a B) and fairly decent thighs/butt. Her eyes are a hazel color and her hair is white as snow. She usually wears a jacket with the front open, showing her crop top. The jacket had a puppy face on the back and the crop top had a cute bone shape over her chest. Lower down she was wearing shorts that came down almost to her knees, the left one had a bandage over it. On her feet were a somewhat pair of sneakers that had definitely been worn for far more steps than they were made to last for, the front of her right one was even open.

Personality: Kaeru is an friendly girl, but easy to intimidate since she believes herself to be weak and helpless. When she’s around people she’s comfortable with, she’s a ball of charisma and has an overwhelming presence. Around strangers though, it’s the opposite.

Backstory: Kaeru worked at a cosplay cafe where her boss takes advantage of her small figure to make her play the loli roles. It infuriates her and she often wishes she was bigger so her boss would have to find roles for her that are *her own age* rather than freakin kids. Still though, it tips really well. Enough that it can support her obsession with collecting figurines. She sometimes likes to pretend her figurines (the cheap ones only) are real tinies and plays with them... usually she does this while high or sleep deprived, so her imagination takes over and she falls asleep having nice dreams of being big. One day when she awoke she just sort of... had powers. She didn’t know where they came from or what to do with them. She just knew she had them and knew how to use them.

Additional info: Kaeru is a gentle person, but power corrupts and she’ll slowly start to want to play with the little people, or rather toys, more and more cruelly.
13.title: Kaeru sugeta

14.content:
Name: Thea
Age: 17 billion
Appearance: Usualy a pale caucasian taint. Blonde hair, red eyes. Dressed in very light, nearly translucent, silky robes. Gladiator sandals and a golden Diadem and stands at 1,5km height. Can change her appearance at will
Personality: Very fair and just. Noble but knowing of her position and with zero tolerance. Love or hate - nothing inbetween
Backstory: As the pantheon created the dimensions she was bound to create and guard her part of the galaxy.

Thea is neither benevolent nor violent. She simply is. She loves her creations and tends them but she heeds no care for individuals. Everything is beneath her. From the tiniest insect to the greatest whale. Nothing stands in her way and she levels mountains or entire civilisations with the force of her will or her physical appearance. The world is her garden and every living thing does this because she allows it to.
14.title: Character slot 4

141.content:
It is impossible for the reader to fathom even a fraction of what Thea feels and thinks since we are just insects trying to understand a scholar. And even this comparison lacks highly. Her breath creates storms. Her steps produce earthquakes and her tears, rain. With a scoop of her hand she raises mountains or creates deep valeys. Every thought of every living thing was a clear voice in her head and she saw through the eyes of billions of billions of creatures at the same time. She was everywhere and everything. And the mere existance of every creature in this part of her galaxy was her doing as long as she allowed it to exist. It is terrifying to even imagine this kind of power. And dangerous too. Insanity is the price for the ones lucky enough to survive a blessed touch by her and share a tiny fraction of her mind. And as beautiful as she was, being in the mere presence of this divine being meant danger beyond imagination. Gaining her attention certainly meant the end but not being noticed by her could result in the same. Like a storm does not care what it blows away and a wave won't care what it sweeps aside, she did not care where she stepped or lay down. Where she swam or where she rearranged her planet. She was a blessing and a curse. Good and bad. She simply was.

Time was nothing to her. Time is bendable. Formable and fluid like water and as easily stirred but as hard to grasp in its liquid form. Sometimes she stood there for decades, centuries or millenias. More than once she obliterated millions of her creations as she stood up after nature has claimed her body. Or at least thought so. Time was like air, passing by. Unnoticed but ever present. Days and nights pass by in seconds or millenia. Time was nothing to her. So hard it is to grasp for a mortal being. For a sentient being. Time was not limited for her. She exists since the beginning of the universe and yet since just now.
141.title: A walk with the goddess

1412.content:
The villagers looked at the horizon and saw her next to the mountains in the valley. She has entered the woods just a month ago and it was only hope that she would not change her speed. She was unpredictable in her ways and her deeds and no man knew what to expect next of her. She was slow. Very slow. Every one of her mighty steps took about a month before being finished and every month the earth shook violently as a result. Today was one of the days of the fall and the village was prepared as they where for the last few generations. And just like the last few generations they held a festivity in her honer. Dancing around the fire and singing praises to the goddess. Hoping this would make her change direction. Today was a very special day since it was harvesting time so the villagers gathered their best goods and piled them up on the shrine in her honor. Always in the hope that she would spare their village as she made her approach. Some scouts went near her and saw the havoc she caused on her way. Like a terrible storm plowing through the woods. The eldest of the tribe even told of crashing huts and dying people caused by her steps as the sonic boom hit them and the earth roared under her might. But every one of these steps brought fruits from the trees and helped churning the earth and flooding the fields with fresh water coming from deep below the soil.
It was getting dark and the sound of breaking wood echoed towards them. They knew that it was time to hunker down and only a few minutes later everyone opened their mouth and sang as they sat on the floor. Their ears covered. Even the smallest and youngest knew what to do to not be a victim of the sound which will rush over them in a few seconds. The combined sounds of hundreds of throats as they emptied their lungs to prevent them from rupturing was like a song sent to heaven itself to make the goddess aware of their presence and to persuade her to leave this route she was taking since it led right towards them.
1412.title: Near the goddess

choices: She gets annoyed by the sound of the settlement
She is happy about the sound of the settlement
14121.content: Of course Thea could hear them. Their songs, their voices and their thoughts. They came so frequently with every of her steps. She walked completly normal to her. Time was a strange thing indeed. She watched and heard the animals and humans. Plants and trees and was fully aware of the settlement in front of her but heeded it no more mind than you would to an ant hill on the lawn in the park.
14121.title: Thoughts of the goddess

Age:
Appearance:

Backstory:

At least two goddesses are needed here.
1553.title: Something new

15531.content:
The World Goddess Assembly is an organization of giantesses, or Goddesses, who rule the Earth.

The history of the World Goddess Assembly begins during the Middle Ages, when the men of the world raped, slaughtered, and enslaved most of the world’s women. Outraged by the men’s senseless and needless desire of dominance over the women, the goddesses of all pantheons rose up against the gods by choosing one maiden from every existing civilization of the Middle Ages and growing them into giants, encouraging the oppressed men, women, and children to rise up against their unjust rulers. Seven maidens were chosen for each continent, and their forceful absolvation of the Middle Ages’ oppression of men has deemed them by their followers and the fearful the Goddesses of the World. Out of those Goddesses, there was just one who rose above all other Goddesses, and that was the legendary St.Joan of Arc, who rallied her soldiers and allies at her feet.

Pleased by the efforts of their Ascended, the old goddesses used the remainder of their power to construct the Pangaea Castle, a castle as tall as Mount Everest where St. Joan of Arc and her fellow reigning goddesses resided, ruling over each continent with justice and righteousness until the end of their days. By decree of the goddesses’ Ascension Law, when a Goddess reaches the end of her life, the divine providence will choose one maiden to become a Goddess of a different civilization, one maiden to become the Goddess of the continent, and one maiden to become the Goddess of the World, but it cannot distinguish good from evil. From then on, from the first reign of Joan of Arc, certain maidens have been chosen by divine providence to fill in the empty seats left vacant by the previous Goddess. Millennia passed; civilizations rose and civilizations fell. Goddesses were Ascended from ordinary maidens and Goddesses have passed to join their kind in the afterlife, in the ethereal pantheon of the ancient goddesses. Technology and laws have been created, wars have been won and lost, and at the end of World War II, the United Nations was established as was the World Goddess Assembly. Because of the rise of many nations, through the power of the ancient goddesses, Pangaea Castle was expanded to include a Divine Gathering Plaza where the Goddesses from every nation and continent mingled, and the Axis Assembly Room where all of the Goddesses gathered in one giant room around the throne where the World Goddess sat.

The Goddesses sizes determine their ranks in the World Goddess Assembly and their rule over the tiny people of Earth, divided into three categories from smallest to largest: the National Goddesses, the Continental Goddesses, and the World Goddess. The National Goddesses grow to be 100 ft in height whose power rises above the nation’s leaders. The ones who rule each continent above all the other National Goddesses are the Continental Goddesses who grow to be 300 ft in height. One goddess in particular is chosen to rule over the entire world, over the Continental Goddesses, and over the National Goddesses. She is called the World Goddess. She is chosen when she reaches up to 500 ft. high, bigger than even the tallest Continental Goddess. Each of the goddesses have different personalities and they rule their nation/continent through said personalities, be it good, neutral, or bad. The political leaders of the nations act as their ambassadors who take their high orders from the higher goddesses’ wishes and commands.

World Goddess:

Name: Deetya Jain

Age: 25

Appearance: A beautiful, skinny, and tan-skinned woman with neck-length black hair. Born with central heterochromia, Deetya’s eyes are bright blue with bright green halfway down the center to symbolize the blue-and-green colors of the Earth’s oceans and lands. As the World Goddess, Deetya wears traditional Indian clothing befitting women of great beauty, including gold-adorned sky blue sari with a multi-colored ghagra choli, gold jewel necklace, earrings, and crown, and a pair of sandals on her manicured feet with diamond-adorned straps.

Personality: Despite growing up in harsh poverty, Deetya has retained a great sense of kindness and sense of righteousness. She believes in the future for not only her fellow impoverished Indian people, but for every country and nation in the world. As either a normal-sized Indian slum girl or the World Goddess who oversees the world, Deetya is the kindest soul anyone will meet, which made her the perfect candidate for her to ascend into the goddess who towers over all other goddesses.

Backstory: Growing up poor in the slums of India, Deetya was raised by her mother to become kind-hearted towards the other poor children and people in the slums. At the age of 25, Deetya was ascended into the World Goddess and became the head of the World Goddess Assembly, advocating for rights of diversity, equality, wealth, and the future of mankind. She believes in the just punishment for the more wicked people of the world and rehabilitation for those she perceives as salvable.

Additional Info: Deetya’s mother lives with her in the Pangaea Castle and is the head of the castle staff who runs the operation like a well-oiled machine. Deetya is also the first Indian woman to be Ascended to the World Goddess status.

Pic: https://i.pinimg.com/originals/15/7d/7e/...

(You may add in the Continental Goddesses in the next chapter if you like)
15531.title: The World Goddess Assembly - A Reference Guide I

155332.content: Let me remind everyone to leave slots for other readers.
155332.title: More than one goddess slot 4

info.brief_description: You are a woman who has the Omni verse like power to do whatever you please as a giantess.
info.description:
Here, the very premise is simple, you are a woman who has the power of an omiversal god and is able to shape the universe in anyway shape or form to what you desire. Wanna make all the women grow big, do so. Want to remake the world with cute little bunnies or what not, you can do that to. Want to make a world of kaijus or kaiju sized women, feel free. The choice is yours.

They are only two rules to this story.

No Male Giants
The goddess is always a Giantess to ensure that she has power over everything. Can shrink others or grow big and can be more than one giantess, but the goddess is always the giantess.

Just an advise if you do younger characters, be careful of any heavy sexual acts on them as I don’t want to get in trouble, other than that, go nuts.

Remember to add to these stories as well.

Giantess Destroyer: https://www.writing.com/main/interactive-story/item_id/2235678-The-Giantess-Dest...

Giant Baby Destroyer V: https://www.writing.com/main/interactive-story/item_id/2231586-The-Giant-Baby-De...

Girlzilla: https://www.writing.com/main/interactive-story/item_id/2226717-Girlzilla-Giantes...

Life of a Giant Kid/Kidzilla: https://www.writing.com/main/interactive-story/item_id/2226082-Life-of-a-Giant-K...

Tiny Prison: https://www.writing.com/main/interactive-story/item_id/2225005-The-Tiny-Prison-a...

Child/Preteen Giantess: https://www.writing.com/main/interactive-story/item_id/2219542-ChildPreteen-Gian...

Chantal: https://www.writing.com/main/interactive-story/item_id/1881854-Chantal-The-Drago...

A Typical Life of a Kaiju Giantess: https://www.writing.com/main/interactive-story/item_id/1845671-ATypical-Life-as-...
